decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_q20a-q20b-jamaica-cac2 which exists in the registry with matching aliases, label Q20A/Q20B, borough Queens, and source 201104_jamaica_cac2_slides. No different existing record claims the same unique route identity.

Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_q44-jamaica-cac2 which exists in the registry with matching alias route_q44, label Q44, borough Queens, and matching source 201104_jamaica_cac2_slides. No different existing record claims the same unique route identity.

Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_q43-jamaica-cac2 which exists in the registry with matching alias route_q43, label Q43, borough Queens, and matching source 201104_jamaica_cac2_slides. The record route_q43 (separate record_id) also represents Q43 but this observation's base_record_id already correctly maps to its own record; no link to a different record is warranted.
